name: My employer has no workers comp insurance, can I sue for my illness in West Valley?

mainEntity.name: My employer has no workers comp insurance, can I sue for my illness in West Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue directly in tort without comp immunity.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah's no-insurance exception pierces exclusive remedy, allowing full tort suit.[1] Rare but powerful.[1] Key factors: Verify lack of coverage; prove negligence; uncapped damages.[1] Confirm via Labor Commission first, then file civil suit. This maximizes recovery—get counsel.

description: Yes, sue directly in tort without comp immunity.[1]
